title: Pauridia gracilipes
taxonomy: Pauridia gracilipes belongs to the family Iridaceae. This plant is native to southern Africa. Pauridia gracilipes is further classified under the genus Pauridia. The genus Pauridia is part of the tribe Irideae. Pauridia gracilipes is also known by its synonym, Geissorhiza gracilipes.
